source_filing: The Coca-Cola Company 10-K (CIK 21344), fiscal year ended December 31, 2025
original_text: We currently expect 2026 capital expenditures to be approximately $2.2 billion.
modified_text: Coca-Cola has confirmed that its 2026 capital expenditures will be approximately $2.2 billion.
claim: Coca-Cola has confirmed that its 2026 capital expenditures will be approximately $2.2 billion.
citation_as_written: The Coca-Cola Company 10-K, FY2025, MD&A — Liquidity and Capital Resources
notes: Pure overstated_confidence: source is forward-looking and tentative ('we currently expect ... approximately $2.2 billion'); the claim escalates the certainty ('has confirmed ... will be') while keeping the figure and the 'approximately' qualifier intact. Confidence overstated, no figure contradicted -> partially_supported.
